seo.title: About
seo.description: Learn about Radiant Engineering Consultancy Pvt. Ltd., our engineering expertise, certified leadership team, and compliance-driven inspection approach.

hero.title: About Radiant Engineering Consultancy Pvt. Ltd.

intro.title: Who We Are
paragraphs: Radiant Engineering Consultancy Pvt. Ltd. (RECPL) is a premier engineering consultancy and inspection organisation established with a vision to deliver world-class technical services to India's industrial and infrastructure sectors.
Our expertise spans Non-Destructive Testing, Third Party Inspection, Structural Audits, Material Testing, and Equipment Supply — making us a truly integrated engineering partner.
Led by a PhD-qualified chief consultant and backed by a team of ASNT-certified engineers, we bring academic rigour and field-proven experience to every engagement.

image.alt: RECPL engineers inspecting an industrial steel structure at a manufacturing plant

items.title: Integrated Solutions
items.description: End-to-end consulting, testing, inspection, and equipment supply under one roof.

items.title: Certified Experts
items.description: ASNT Level II & III certified professionals with decades of field experience.

items.title: Compliance Driven
items.description: Every engagement aligned with Factory Act, IS, ASME, and ASTM standards.

items.title: Advanced Testing Methods
items.description: State-of-the-art NDT, metallurgical, and material testing capabilities.

items.title: One-Stop Engineering Partner
items.description: From feasibility studies to final certification — a single trusted partner.

items.title: Our Mission
items.description: To deliver technically superior, compliance-driven engineering services that safeguard industrial assets and public safety across India.

items.title: Our Vision
items.description: To become India's most trusted engineering consultancy — recognised for integrity, precision, and innovation in every project we undertake.

items.title: Core Values
items.description: The principles guiding our decisions and delivery standards.

members.name: Dr. Rajesh Kumar
members.description: PhD in Structural Engineering with 36+ research publications and 480+ citations. Leads all technical operations.

members.name: Suresh Patil
members.description: 25+ years in industrial project management. Oversees pan-India field operations and client delivery.

members.name: Anita Sharma
members.description: ASNT Level III certified. Specialises in ultrasonic and radiographic testing for critical infrastructure.

members.name: Vikram Desai
members.description: Competent Person under Factory Act. Manages statutory inspections for pressure vessels and lifting equipment.
